name: A Matching Game
short_description: Match the cards to defeat Robo Dog in this fun matching memory game!
detailed_description:
Welcome to A Matching Game! This is a simple game of selecting two cards and trying to find more matches than your opponent. Enjoy some lo-fi music as you try to beat Robo Dog in levels that get progressively harder. The further you get into the game, the smarter Robo Dog becomes!

  • There are 30 levels to play against Robo Dog
  • Time Trial modes (Mini, Large and Mega) to test your speed
  • Lo-fi music to enjoy while playing
  • 20 different avatars to choose from
  • 8 different card backs to unlock
  • A Family Friendly game, great for all ages!
